subject: EMS
title: Entrepreneurship
tagline: Start your business — identify opportunities, plan and pitch your idea!

stages.name: Stage 1
stages.question: What is an entrepreneur?
options: The specific group of customers a business aims to reach
Someone who starts and runs their own business
The chance of losing money or failing
A document outlining how a business will operate and grow
stages.correctOption: Someone who starts and runs their own business
stages.correctFeedback: Yes! Someone who starts and runs their own business is right — onward!
stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is Someone who starts and runs their own business.

The money needed to start a business

stages.wrongFeedback: Not quite — the answer is A document outlining how a business will operate and grow.
